\tzpentry{ID5803}{Pattern Torsion Functional}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5803 introduces Pattern Torsion Functional as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \frac{\partial\Omega_{\text{pattern}}}{\partial\tau} = -\frac{\kappa^2}{4\pi} \int_0^{r_{\text{gal}}} R(r,\tau) \Sigma(r) \frac{\partial W}{\partial\Omega_{\text{pattern}}} r \, dr \end{equation}
